Business: Mrs. Bectors Food Specialities Limited manufactures and distributes various food products in India. The company provides biscuits, including cookies, creams, crackers, digestives, and glucose under the Mrs. Bector's Cremica brand. It also offers bakery products that includes breads, buns, kulchas, rusk, pizza bases, and cakes under the English Oven…

  Current: 15.84  (-6.27% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows
